title: Bump compiler submodule for corelib publish CI

source.subject: chore(compiler): bump submodule for corelib publish CI

body:
## Outcome

Bump submodule for corelib publish CI.

## Context

- Workstream **ci-release** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **CI workflows and deploy infra** (`v02-ci-deploy-infra`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`f793c45`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/f793c45) — chore(compiler): bump submodule for corelib publish CI
